meta.siteDescription: High-value physical commodity intelligence. Live prices, ICC Incoterms® 2020, and delivered price calculator for metals, energy, and agriculture.

footer.tagline: Professional-grade commodity intelligence for physical traders, procurement teams, and logistics specialists worldwide.
footer.disclaimer: Indicative prices only. Not investment advice.

hero.subheadline: Live market prices, ICC Incoterms® 2020 educational tools, and a delivered-price basis calculator — built for metals, energy, and agricultural trading desks.

home.feature1Desc: Real-time indicative prices across base metals, precious metals, energy, and agricultural commodities with 1-week trend sparklines and watchlist management.
home.feature2Desc: Fully interactive educational tool covering all 11 ICC Incoterms® 2020 rules with visual risk/cost transfer timelines — available in EN, DE, and ES.
home.feature3Desc: Layer spot prices, physical premiums, freight costs, and marine insurance to calculate your estimated delivered cost, then request a firm quote.
home.incotermsCtaDesc: Our interactive Incoterms® 2020 tool shows exactly where risk and costs transfer between seller and buyer for all 11 ICC rules.

markets.pageSubheading: Indicative prices for base metals, energy, and agricultural commodities. Click any row to view the price chart and calculate your delivered cost.
markets.pageDisclaimer: All prices are indicative exchange settlement values for reference only and do not constitute an offer. Physical delivery prices will differ based on location premiums, quality specifications, and logistics.

incotermsPage.pageSubheading: The 11 ICC Incoterms® 2020 rules define the responsibilities, risks, and costs of the seller and buyer in international trade contracts. Use the interactive tool below to explore each rule.
incotermsPage.iccNotice: Incoterms® is a registered trademark of the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC). These rules are the globally recognised standard for international commercial terms. This tool is for educational purposes only.
incotermsPage.pageDisclaimer: For educational purposes only. Always refer to the official ICC Incoterms® 2020 publication and seek qualified legal advice for your specific trade contracts.

about.headline: Specialist Commodity Intelligence for Physical Markets
about.intro: Aurexon is a specialist commodity intelligence platform serving physical traders, procurement professionals, and logistics teams across metals, energy, and agricultural markets.
about.missionHeading: Bringing Transparency to Physical Commodity Markets
about.missionText: We believe physical commodity traders deserve the same quality of market intelligence available to large financial institutions. Our platform provides real-time pricing, Incoterms® education, and delivered-cost tools designed specifically for the physical market.
about.value1Desc: Clear, accurate market data with full methodology disclosure and no hidden fees.
about.value2Desc: Physical commodity pricing requires exact cost accounting. We make that simple.
about.value3Desc: Built by commodity traders for commodity traders, with deep market knowledge baked in.
about.value4Desc: Covering major exchanges and physical delivery points across six continents.
about.ctaDesc: Access live prices, Incoterms® 2020 tools, and our delivered price calculator.

market.watchlistEmpty: No watchlisted commodities. Click ★ next to any row to add it.
market.noResults: No commodities match the selected filter.
market.dataDisclaimer: Indicative prices only. Not investment advice.

chart.defaultPhysicalContext: {symbol} is an internationally traded physical commodity. Prices shown are indicative exchange settlement values and do not include location-specific premiums, quality adjustments, or logistics.
chart.chartDisclaimer: Historical data for reference only. All prices are indicative and subject to market conditions.

calculator.title: Basis & Delivered Price Calculator
calculator.subtitle: {exchange} {commodity} — Physical Pricing Tool
calculator.tooltipSpot: The current {exchange} official cash / nearby futures settlement price.
calculator.tooltipPremium: Physical market premium or discount over the benchmark. Negative values indicate a discount. Per tonne.
calculator.tooltipFreight: Estimated all-in freight, port handling, and inland logistics cost to delivery point.
calculator.tooltipInsurance: All-risk marine cargo insurance as a % of CIF value. Typically 0.10%–0.35% for base metals.
calculator.insuranceNote: Rate applied to the CIF value (Spot + Premium + Freight).
calculator.breakdownEmpty: Enter a base spot price to see the calculation.
calculator.basisNote: Premium / Discount expressed in basis points over the benchmark price.
calculator.ctaNote: This will open a pre-filled email to {email}
calculator.ctaDisabledHint: Enter a base spot price to enable
calculator.disclaimer: This calculator provides indicative prices only. Final delivered prices are subject to market conditions, counterparty terms, and formal contract. Aurexon accepts no liability for decisions made on the basis of these estimates.

incoterms.sectionSubtitle: ICC International Commercial Terms — Official Rules for Trade
incoterms.noResults: No Incoterms match the selected filter.
incoterms.groupAny: Rules for Any Mode or Modes of Transport
incoterms.groupSea: Rules for Sea and Inland Waterway Transport
